title: neowimmeria costata
intro: Neowimmeria costata, also known as the Costate Neowimmeria, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Celastraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, headache, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. The plant is also known to have various health benefits, including reducing stress, improving cognitive function, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Neowimmeria costata is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be applied topically in the form of creams and ointments.
